pi_items.source: Task instructions and OpenBCI_GUI codebase (EmgSettingsUI.pde confirms EMG widget exists)
Task instructions and OpenBCI_GUI codebase (EmgSettingsEnums.pde confirms '200' is a valid EmgUVLimit value)
Task instructions and OpenBCI_GUI codebase (ControlPanel.pde confirms 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' is a data source)

privileged_info_summary: The task requires adding the EMG widget and setting its uV Limit to 200 while using the 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' data source. Codebase analysis confirms that the EMG widget exists, '200' is a valid option in its uV Limit dropdown, and 'SYNTHETIC (algorithmic)' is a built-in OpenBCI GUI data source.
